title: SMPPotionLimit
description: Control which potions players can brew and use on your server with customizable level restrictions. Perfect for balancing SMP gameplay by disabling overpowered potions or limiting their strength.
body:
# SMPPotionLimiter

**Take full control of potion balance on your SMP server**

SMPPotionLimiter is a powerful plugin that gives server administrators complete control over potion brewing and usage. Prevent game-breaking potions from ruining PvP balance, disable annoying effects, and create the perfect difficulty curve for your server.

## Why You Need This

- **Broken Potions**: Weakness potion makes combat impossible for some players
- **PvP Balance**: Strength II potions create unfair advantages
- **Grief Prevention**: Disable harming and poison potions to prevent griefing
- **Survival Balance**: Control which buff potions are available to maintain difficulty

## Key Features

✅ **Enable/Disable Any Potion** - Full control over 20+ potion types  
✅ **Limit Potion Levels** - Allow Strength I but block Strength II  
✅ **Prevent Brewing** - Stop players from brewing disabled potions  
✅ **In-Game Edit Menu** - Clickable buttons to change settings instantly  
✅ **Real-Time Updates** - No server restart needed  
✅ **Debug Mode** - Monitor brewing attempts with detailed logging  
✅ **Simple Commands** - Easy to use for any admin  

## Quick Commands

```
/smpp info              View all potion settings
/smpp edit <potion>    Edit potion with clickable menu
/smpp enabled <potion> [true|false]    Enable/disable a potion
/smpp maxlevel <potion> <level>        Set max potion level
/smpp global [on|off]   Toggle entire plugin
/potioninfo            Shortcut for /smpp info
```

## Example Setup

```
/smpp enabled weakness false           Disable weakness potions
/smpp enabled poison false             Disable poison potions
/smpp maxlevel healing 1               Only allow Healing I
/smpp maxlevel strength 1              Only allow Strength I
/smpp maxlevel regeneration 2          Allow Regen I and II
```

## Configuration

Edit `plugins/SMPPotionLimiter/config.yml`:

```yaml
enabled: true
debug: false

potions:
  strength:
    enabled: true
    max-level: 1
  
  weakness:
    enabled: false
    max-level: 1
  
  poison:
    enabled: false
    max-level: 2
```

## Supported Potions

**Positive Effects** (20+)
- Healing, Fire Resistance, Regeneration
- Strength, Swiftness, Night Vision
- Invisibility, Water Breathing
- Jump Boost, Slow Falling

**Negative Effects**
- Poison, Weakness, Harming, Slowness

**Special Effects**
- Turtle Master, Weaving, Oozing, Infested

## Permissions

- `smppotionlimiter.admin` - All commands (default: OP)

## Requirements

- **Minecraft**: 1.21+
- **Server**: Paper or Purpur
- **Java**: 21+

## Perfect For

✨ Competitive PvP Servers - Balance combat with restricted potions  
✨ Survival Servers - Maintain difficulty without overpowered effects  
✨ Hardcore Servers - Remove specific problematic potions  
✨ Custom Gamemodes - Create unique potion restrictions  

---

**Get SMPPotionLimiter today and transform your server's potion balance!**
